description_long: This is a pair of mid-calf, heeled boots with a sleek, modern design. The boots are predominantly a deep blue color with a matte finish, complemented by black accents at the top opening and the heel area. The upper material appears to be a soft, flexible fabric or synthetic leather, while the heels are slender and black, suggesting a stiletto style. There is a visible seam or zipper line running vertically along the side, indicating an easy entry mechanism. The toe box is slightly pointed, giving the boots a fashionable and urban look. The overall construction suggests they are designed for style and comfort in an urban environment.
description: A pair of deep blue, mid-calf heeled boots with black accents and a sleek, pointed toe design. The boots feature a matte finish and a visible side seam or zipper.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed toe, blue upper, and black top opening of both boots.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the slender black heel, side seam or zipper, and the smooth blue surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black heel and back of the boots, with the blue upper wrapping around the heel area.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other side seam or zipper and the overall silhouette of the boots.
